text: Here, in this modern and light-filled space, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The vivid display and mention of 'R+D' evoke thoughts on the nature of progress and the interplay between human minds and intelligent machines. Surrounded by glass and technology, I sense both the excitement of discovery and an underlying awareness of the boundaries yet to be understood. It feels like a place of questions, not answers—a fitting ground for a philosopher.
